title: E91: Entanglement-Based Quantum Key Distribution
description: Master the E91 protocol - Artur Ekert's entanglement-based approach to quantum key distribution. Learn how Bell inequality violations can detect eavesdropping and provide device-independent security guarantees.
learningObjectives: Explain the E91 protocol using entangled pairs
Understand how Bell inequality testing detects eavesdropping
Implement the E91 measurement and key extraction process
Compare E91 with BB84 in terms of security and resources
Calculate the CHSH value from measurement correlations
